name: Codex-Llmcaller
description: Call API-key authenticated model providers through local profiles, encrypted secrets, Gemini grounding, multimodal inputs, fallback profiles, and automatic continuation.

interface.longDescription: Use a local MCP server to call Gemini, DeepSeek, OpenAI-compatible providers, and Anthropic with encrypted local secrets, configurable profiles, strict delegation metadata, Gemini Google Search grounding, multimodal inputs, fallback profiles, provider-aware routing metadata, and automatic continuation for truncated responses.
defaultPrompt: Use Gemini to review this answer.
